headline: Cummins (CMI) Gains on Data Center Power Demand Despite Weak Truck Market
summary: The London Company, an investment management company, released its “Income Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund’s Income Equity Portfolio declined 1.4% gross (-1.6% net) in the fourth quarter of 2025, underperforming the Russell 1000 Value Index, which gained 3.8%, as stock selection weighed on […]
